name: Pass Attack Pesto Pizza
recipeIngredient: 4 oz pine nuts or slivered almonds
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F.
2. Spread pesto over the crust, spooning out most of the oil to prevent dripping.
3. Sprinkle with pine nuts and top with grated cheese, spreading evenly to the edge.
4. Bake for 8 to 12 minutes, until the cheese is melted and browned.
Per serving: 358 calories; 15g protein, 30g carbohydrates, 21g fat (51%); 64mg cholesterol, 945mg sodium.
